title: Ultra Limited Adidas Sneaker Campaign Poster AI
sourceTitle: Ultra Limited Adidas Sneaker Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium vertical 9:16 futuristic sports campaign poster for ADIDAS AEROBLADE X - LIMITED DROP, presented as an ultra-limited Adidas sneaker drop. Subject: A single hero sneaker is captured at a dramatic low angle with levitating above a dark obsidian running track split by glowing energy cracks; knit mesh, sculpted foam, translucent panels, reflective stripes, and carbon-fiber sole plate remain the main material focus. Scene: Dark obsidian running track with glowing energy cracks, neon light trails, particles, mist, and faint silhouettes of elite sprinters frozen mid-dash behind the shoe. Composition: Hero sneaker floats center-frame with strong agency-ad hierarchy, sharp boxed feature callouts, cinematic product scale, and clear 9:16 poster spacing for the headline and product title. Signature Elements: Preserved ultra limited adidas sneaker campaign poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: World-class futuristic athletic footwear advertising with ultra-detailed hyper-realistic product photography, cinematic studio lighting, luxury sports campaign polish, rich textures, and explosive motion energy. Color Palette: Matte black, electric red, silver, deep charcoal, subtle neon blue highlights, white typography, and high-contrast running-track glow. Lighting: Cinematic studio product lighting mixed with track energy glow, crisp reflections on translucent panels and carbon fiber, mist highlights, and dramatic low-angle shadow. Typography: OWN THE SPEED is the main headline; ADIDAS AEROBLADE X - LIMITED DROP is the product title; Built for the ones who never run ordinary. appears as a clean subheadline with elegant boxed feature callouts. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium vertical 9:16 futuristic sports campaign poster for ADIDAS AEROBLADE X - SILVER VOLT, presented as an ultra-limited Adidas sneaker drop. Subject: A single hero sneaker is captured at a dramatic low angle with hovering through red neon speed trails over a cracked carbon track; knit mesh, sculpted foam, translucent panels, reflective stripes, and carbon-fiber sole plate remain the main material focus. Scene: Dark obsidian running track with glowing energy cracks, neon light trails, particles, mist, and faint silhouettes of elite sprinters frozen mid-dash behind the shoe. Composition: Hero sneaker floats center-frame with strong agency-ad hierarchy, sharp boxed feature callouts, cinematic product scale, and clear 9:16 poster spacing for the headline and product title. Signature Elements: Preserved ultra limited adidas sneaker campaign poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: World-class futuristic athletic footwear advertising with ultra-detailed hyper-realistic product photography, cinematic studio lighting, luxury sports campaign polish, rich textures, and explosive motion energy. Color Palette: Matte black, electric red, silver, deep charcoal, subtle neon blue highlights, white typography, and high-contrast running-track glow. Lighting: Cinematic studio product lighting mixed with track energy glow, crisp reflections on translucent panels and carbon fiber, mist highlights, and dramatic low-angle shadow. Typography: RUN BEYOND ORDINARY is the main headline; ADIDAS AEROBLADE X - SILVER VOLT is the product title; Engineered for the edge of speed. appears as a clean subheadline with elegant boxed feature callouts. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
